    <item>
      <title>NBA seeking more punitive anti-tanking penalties, including fining teams 'millions of dollars'</title>
      <description>In addition to planning to reform the draft lottery in an effort to deter teams from tanking, the NBA is also interested in expanding its ability to penalize teams who manipulate player availability and rotations in an effort to lose.</description>
      <pubDate>27 Mar 2026 22:47:38 -0400</pubDate>
      <link>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/nba_seeking_more_punitive_anti_tanking_penalties_including_fining_teams_millions_of_dollars/s1_14822_43653950</link>

      <title>Kawhi Leonard's clutch shot saves Clippers from embarrassing loss</title>
      <description>Kawhi Leonard declared his Los Angeles Clippers are "not scared of nobody" going into the playoffs. Friday, his clutch shot saved the Clippers when the 16-win Indiana Pacers put a scare into them.</description>

      <title>Spurs' Victor Wembanyama explains why he should be MVP: 'I'm the most impactful player'</title>
      <description>Should Victor Wembanyama be this year's MVP? Wembanyama certainly thinks so.</description>
      <pubDate>25 Mar 2026 11:41:09 -0400</pubDate>
      <link>https://www.yardbarker.com/nba/articles/spurs_victor_wembanyama_explains_why_he_should_be_mvp_im_the_most_impactful_player/s1_14822_43639517</link>
